nasb.text: Now while Ezra was praying and making confession, weeping and prostrating himself before the house of God, a very large assembly, men, women and children, gathered to him from Israel; for the people wept bitterly.

esv.text: While Ezra prayed and made confession, weeping and casting himself down before the house of God, a very great assembly of men, women, and children, gathered to him out of Israel, for the people wept bitterly.

cnv.text: 以斯拉禱告、認罪、哭泣，俯伏在　神的殿前的時候，有一大群以色列人，包括男女小孩，在他面前聚集；眾人也都痛哭。

ccb.text: 以斯拉祷告、认罪、哭泣、俯伏在上帝的殿前时，一大群以色列人，包括男女和孩子，都聚集到他那里，与他一起痛哭。
